steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: ”Look for indicators such as large foramina”—since PSP doesn't fossilize, researchers must use visible signs to determine whether it was present.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: ”Infer” means to conclude from available evidence—exactly what researchers do when they use foramina as indicators to determine that PSP was present, even though it doesn't fossilize. The other three describe acquiring, isolating, or preserving physical material, none of which aligns with deducing an invisible structure from visible clues. That matches choice A — A is correct.
